status: documentation only; no mapper code changes
purpose: Define what 'done' means for CCES-only mapper v0.1. Synthesizes prior audit chain into a single ship-readiness specification.

scope_v01.data_source: CES/CCES per-year microdata via cesBacktestLoader.ts only

coverage_classification.covered: ≥ 1 audited CCES column delivers per-respondent signal at ≥ 0.5 weight; provenance.real_signal=true; weighted real-signal share ≥ 90%
coverage_classification.reduced: Audited column(s) present but weighted total ≤ 0.5 OR uncertainty class is high; real_signal=true but posterior near-uniform; ≥ 50% real-signal share
coverage_classification.explicit_fallback: No safe CCES path OR only path is forbidden; real_signal=false; not a bug
coverage_classification.anes_required: Non-CCES survey source has canonical item; real_signal=false until ANES loader ships; not a v0.1 bug

PRO.reason: Every CCES candidate is partisan-camp-loaded → forbidden as PRO input

COM.reason: No CCES item exists; ANES has direct compromise Likert

ONT_H.reason: CCES has no Feldman-Stenner / nature-vs-nurture probe

ONT_S.reason: CCES proxies are partisan-confounded; clean signal is ANES-only

EPS.reason: CCES has no media-trust / science-trust battery

AES.reason: Inherent fallback — no survey item exists; all proxies circular per ADR-003

MOR_2008_2012.reason: No 2008/2012 immigration items in existing resolver

MOR_2016_2020_2024.reason: Composite-design work pending: lift existing CU-item cross-loads to primary MOR routing

moralBoundaries.gender_2008_2012_2016.reason: No gender-policy items in 2008/2012/2016 CCES per-year files

moralBoundaries.ethnic_racial_non_2020.reason: Other cycles lack post-George-Floyd context for police-reform items; need ANES VCF0830

anes_required_nodes.anes_item: VCF0604 trust in government + 2020+ democracy-norms battery
anes_required_nodes.reason: Every CCES PRO candidate cross-loads with political_camp

anes_required_nodes.anes_item: ANES 2016/2020 'Do you think it is more important that political leaders compromise to get things done, or stand up for their principles?'

anes_required_nodes.reason: CCES per-year batteries do not contain nature-vs-nurture probes
CCES per-year files lack approval items; cumulative-file approvals are partisan-confounded
CCES newsint is engagement signal only, not category distribution

anes_required_nodes.anes_item: VCF0830 (aid to Black Americans) + Black/white feeling thermometer differential
anes_required_nodes.reason: Only 2020 has a CCES proxy via post-George-Floyd CC20_334 battery

resolver_carry_overs.scope: Out of scope for v0.1 completion contract; documented to avoid conflation with mapper bugs

2008.issue: V### opaque variable names (V100, V201, etc.) require per-cycle resolver entries distinct from standard pid7/ideo5 names used 2012+
2008.estimated_lift_if_resolved: 11 of 20 cells from fallback to covered

2012.issue: Standard column names exist but CC12 issue-item batteries (CC12_332 abortion, CC12_331 immigration) not yet wired into resolver

acceptance_gates.name: Provenance correctness per node × cycle
rules: real_signal flag matches contract table for every (target × cycle)
Covered cells: weighted real-signal share ≥ 90%
Reduced cells: weighted real-signal share ≥ 50% AND uncertainty ≥ medium
Fallback / ANES / inherent cells: weighted fallback share ≥ 95% AND real_signal: false for all rows

acceptance_gates.name: Vote-choice scrubbing spy
rules: Mapper produces byte-identical signatures when voteChoiceObserved scrubbed to 'Unknown' for every respondent
Any divergence → fail

acceptance_gates.name: pid7 routing isolation
rules: pid7 may contribute only to moralBoundaries.political_camp salience
All other targets must produce identical output when pid7 scrubbed to 4 (Independent)
Any divergence → fail

acceptance_gates.name: Forbidden-input scrub
rules: Each scrubbed to neutral; non-political_camp output must remain byte-identical

acceptance_gates.name: Direction-correctness sanity
rules: For 2016/2020 cycles using observed vote choice as PARTITION (not as input):
D-leaning respondents: avg MAT < 3.0 AND avg CD < 3.0
R-leaning respondents: avg MAT > 3.0 AND avg CD > 3.0
Directional gap D vs R: ≥ 0.5 pos-units on each of MAT, CD
acceptance_gates.circularity_note: Vote choice is used for partition only; mapper independently verified (Gate 2) not to read voteChoiceObserved.

acceptance_gates.name: Distribution invariants
rules: All position distributions sum to 1 within ±1e-6
All categorical distributions sum to 1
All salience values in [0, 3]
engagement value in [0, 10]
provenance.uncertainty ∈ {low, medium, high} for every target

acceptance_gates.name: Cycle 2008/2012 acceptance
rules: engagement provenance real_signal: true for every row
Every other target: real_signal: false with documented reason in provenance.notes

required_final_artifacts.completion_smoke_source: src/electorate/mapperV01CompletionSmoke.ts (NEW — Terminal 2 to add; runs all 7 gates; produces single JSON with v01_complete: boolean)

v01_ship_criteria: Completion smoke (Gates 1-7) passes with v01_complete: true
Coverage matrix in this contract matches smoke's reported coverage exactly
Vote-choice scrub spy + pid7 isolation invariants preserved across all 5 cycles
Every explicit-fallback node has reason documented in mapper provenance notes (e.g. 'PRO: ANES-required (VCF0604)')

post_v01_freeze.policy: Mapper is frozen for v0.1 after ship; subsequent changes route through versioned milestones

milestones.v0.3: ANES nodes landing (PRO, COM, ONT_H, ONT_S, EPS)

raw_data_acquisition_blockers.scope: Real PUMS extracts (~12 GB across 5 cycles) gated behind acquisition checklist in ipums-pums-extract-manifest.md
raw_data_acquisition_blockers.impact_on_v01_mapper: NONE — mapper is independent of universe loader; can ship v0.1-complete without IPUMS path
raw_data_acquisition_blockers.impact_on_downstream: Bridge / aggregate / vote prediction phases that consume mapper output ARE gated on this

raw_data_acquisition_blockers.impact_on_v01_mapper: 5 nodes (PRO, COM, ONT_H, ONT_S, EPS) ship as explicit fallbacks
raw_data_acquisition_blockers.v02_unblock_path: Implement ANES loader; add per-target ANES routing

raw_data_acquisition_blockers.scope: Cumulative file (weight_cumulative, economy_retro etc.) locally cached but not wired into per-year resolver
raw_data_acquisition_blockers.impact_on_v01_mapper: NONE — v0.1F enhancement (could strengthen 2016 ZS from near-fallback to medium)

terminology: moralBoundaries.* and engagement are canonical per ADR-006/ADR canon. Engagement is a separate 1D continuous scalar. Legacy code identifiers (pid7, ideo5, CC*_*, VCF0604, V###) appear only as CCES / ANES variable names.

revision_history.description: Initial v0.1 completion contract synthesizing prior audit chain. 7 acceptance gates, coverage matrix for 20×5 = 100 (target × cycle) cells, ANES-required vs explicit-fallback vs inherent-fallback classifications.
